name: DataMind Pro
description: DataMind Pro transforms raw datasets into actionable insights using advanced machine learning models. Perfect for business analysts and data scientists who need fast, reliable answers from complex data.

name: CodeCraft AI
description: CodeCraft AI is your pair programmer that never sleeps. It reviews pull requests, suggests optimizations, detects security vulnerabilities, and generates boilerplate so you can focus on what matters.

name: NexusWriter
description: NexusWriter crafts compelling marketing copy, blog posts, product descriptions, and social media content tailored to your brand voice. Trained on high-converting content across 50+ industries.

name: SupportBot Ultra
description: SupportBot Ultra handles tier-1 and tier-2 customer support with human-like empathy and precision. Integrates with your knowledge base and escalates complex issues to the right team member automatically.

name: QuantumSales
tagline: Close more deals with AI-powered insights
description: QuantumSales analyzes your CRM data, identifies high-probability leads, drafts personalized outreach, and coaches your team on winning strategies based on successful deal patterns.

name: FinanceGuard
description: FinanceGuard monitors transactions, flags compliance risks, generates audit-ready reports, and provides real-time financial health dashboards for enterprises operating across multiple jurisdictions.

name: HireIQ
description: HireIQ screens resumes, conducts preliminary AI interviews, scores candidates against your criteria, and reduces time-to-hire by 60%. Bias-aware algorithms ensure fair and consistent evaluation.

name: LogisticsMind
tagline: Optimize your supply chain in real time
description: LogisticsMind processes live data from your supply chain to predict disruptions, optimize routing, automate vendor communications, and reduce logistics costs by an average of 23%.

name: LegalEagle
description: LegalEagle reviews contracts, flags risky clauses, suggests standard alternatives, and maintains a searchable archive of all your agreements. Trained on millions of commercial contracts.

name: MarketPulse
description: MarketPulse continuously monitors your competitors, tracks market trends, analyzes customer sentiment across social media, and delivers weekly intelligence briefings tailored to your industry.

name: DevOps Sentinel
description: DevOps Sentinel watches your infrastructure 24/7, predicts failures before they happen, auto-scales resources, and provides root cause analysis for incidents in plain English.

name: BrandVoice
description: BrandVoice learns your brand guidelines and ensures all content — from tweets to press releases — stays on-brand. It reviews drafts, rewrites off-brand copy, and trains your team in real time.

name: CX Optimizer
description: CX Optimizer analyzes customer journey data, identifies friction points, recommends UX improvements, and personalizes experiences across all touchpoints to maximize satisfaction and retention.

name: PipelineAI
description: PipelineAI integrates with your sales stack to identify stalled deals, suggest next best actions, automate follow-ups, and provide managers with clear pipeline health visibility.

name: TaxBot Enterprise
description: TaxBot Enterprise automates tax calculations across jurisdictions, monitors regulatory changes, prepares filing documentation, and flags potential savings opportunities before deadlines.

name: PeopleInsight
tagline: Understand and retain your best people
description: PeopleInsight analyzes engagement survey data, identifies flight risks, recommends retention strategies, and helps managers have more productive 1:1 conversations with AI-generated talking points.

name: InventoryGenius
description: InventoryGenius predicts demand, automates reorder points, reduces overstock and stockouts, and provides category-level inventory health dashboards updated in real time.

name: ComplianceAI
description: ComplianceAI monitors regulatory changes across GDPR, SOC2, HIPAA, and more. It maps controls to requirements, tracks evidence, and generates audit-ready reports for any framework.

name: AdOracle
description: AdOracle manages your paid advertising across Google, Meta, and LinkedIn. It optimizes bids in real time, generates ad variations, pauses underperforming campaigns, and maximizes ROAS automatically.

name: SecurityHawk
description: SecurityHawk monitors your systems for threats, correlates security events across your stack, automates initial incident response, and provides plain-language explanations of every alert.
